reviews.review_description: Only 0.99 a month? Very satisfying game great for getting unwanted topics off your head. Although I do have some suggestions for full release. First, you should add sound effects for the slicing. Next, you should add different lasers with different powers, red would be fire like, the limb you slice would have fire spreading all over the body burning the pixel people, blue would be ice freezing the pixel people giving you a more powered slice, yellow would be electricity after the slice lightning would strike where yoy slice. Last, you should give the pixel people abilities with an ai they can fight back with, the diffrent colors woyld have different abilities!

developer_response.body: Thanks! You have a very vivid imagination, and I strive to provide the best kind of technological foundation to make such dreams come true. I'm hoping more game developers become aware of this technology, which is meant for them so they can create much better games like the one you described.

reviews.review_description: Me personally this game is good, but it does need some fixing me personally I know I’m saying this again, but the game needs a way to move some music and maybe some like falling features yeah other than that this game is pretty good and very very satisfying. ￼

developer_response.body: I'll fix the movement issue soon, it's setup in a way so it is disabled if stick drift is detected. Music is low priority at the moment, I'm a solo dev. I'm interested in fall physics where the dismembered piece breaks into voxels like in Tron.

reviews.review_description: i love this game so much because like it's literally so real but i don't know how to um subscribe so yeah i love this game a lot it's like a $10 ten bro 10 out of 10 and the only thing that's kinda confusing is the fact that the the gray one you can't even slice it you should make AA gun that's um easy to like shoot and like get it like i want a gun in the game that's for free.

developer_response.body: Thanks! You can subscribe in the Meta Store home page for Slice Art Engine, website or headset. There is also a Subscription option in game when you toggle with X. Not sure what you mean by the gray one, there should definitely be a gray dummy you can slice. Let me know if you need more help.

reviews.review_description: So bro I love this game the mechanics are so cool and refined! I’m a game dev myself and I really want this game to continue getting worked on. So i was wondering if maybe i could help you with the game. I’m free on weekends and I know a lot of unity stuff and have some good scripts for the project. I have a lot of really good ideas to. And if you did let me help I don’t need any credited or money i just want to work for free and expand the game! I’m old enough for this kind of stuff as well, don’t want to leave my age in this review though. I would love to buy the supporter thing as well.

developer_response.body: Thanks! A Unity/UE engine plugin is something I've had in mind for a long time so that other devs can implement Slice Art Engine into their games. I'm waiting for a large enough demand from devs or a capable game studio in order to work on such a plugin. In the meantime, I'm pushing the capabilities of the tech for gamers to enjoy in VR.

reviews.review_description: So many positive reviews, but the game crashes, barely functions in the first place, movement is weird, no camera rotation, it's a mess and I don't want to get a subscription for something like that.

developer_response.body: Sorry the recent updates were made to address a previous small percent of crashes, but it made things worse. I am working to get this under control. The most recent update should work for you, if not please check back again in May 2026.

developer_response.body: Slow Regen is free, press the Left Trigger. Also pls support if you can.

developer_response.body: Solo dev here, the subs help push this toward full-time development. Core slicing stays free.

developer_response.body: I'm so sorry, the loading phase crash is a known issue. I just updated the app, please see if that helps. If not, I am working hard to get this issue corrected within a few weeks.

reviews.review_description: Super

Slice Art Engine is a fascinating demo exploring the art of slicing with a strong focus on precision. Every cut is tracked with detailed metrics — pixels touched, FPS, and other metadata — making it a promising foundation for future sword fighting games.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! I really focus on a strong foundation for game devs to build on.
